use_cases: Managing personal tasks and to-do items in productivity applications
Adding task tracking functionality to project management dashboards
Enabling quick task entry with animated transitions in note-taking apps
Providing inline editing capabilities for task lists in workflow tools
Creating interactive checklists for collaborative workspaces
ai_summary: A feature-rich Todo Task Management component with full CRUD operations including add, edit, delete, and toggle completion states. Includes smooth fly-in animations when adding tasks using Framer Motion, inline editing on double-click, and a clean minimalist interface suitable for productivity and project management applications.
